speaker: DUCHESS
text: Who meets us here? My niece Plantagenet

speaker: DUCHESS
text: Led in the hand of her kind aunt of Gloucester?

speaker: DUCHESS
text: Now, for my life, she’s wandering to the Tower,

speaker: DUCHESS
text: On pure heart’s love, to greet the tender prince.—

speaker: DUCHESS
text: Daughter, well met.

speaker: ANNE
text: God give your Graces both

speaker: ANNE
text: A happy and a joyful time of day.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: As much to you, good sister. Whither away?

speaker: ANNE
text: No farther than the Tower, and, as I guess,

speaker: ANNE
text: Upon the like devotion as yourselves,

speaker: ANNE
text: To gratulate the gentle princes there.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Kind sister, thanks. We’ll enter all together.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: And in good time here the Lieutenant comes.—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Master Lieutenant, pray you, by your leave,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: How doth the Prince and my young son of York?

speaker: BRAKENBURY
text: Right well, dear madam. By your patience,

speaker: BRAKENBURY
text: I may not suffer you to visit them.

speaker: BRAKENBURY
text: The King hath strictly charged the contrary.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: The King? Who’s that?

speaker: BRAKENBURY
text: I mean, the Lord Protector.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: The Lord protect him from that kingly title!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Hath he set bounds between their love and me?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: I am their mother. Who shall bar me from them?

speaker: DUCHESS
text: I am their father’s mother. I will see them.

speaker: ANNE
text: Their aunt I am in law, in love their mother.

speaker: ANNE
text: Then bring me to their sights. I’ll bear thy blame

speaker: ANNE
text: And take thy office from thee, on my peril.

speaker: BRAKENBURY
text: No, madam, no. I may not leave it so.

speaker: BRAKENBURY
text: I am bound by oath, and therefore pardon me.

speaker: STANLEY
text: Let me but meet you ladies one hour hence,

speaker: STANLEY
text: And I’ll salute your Grace of York as mother

speaker: STANLEY
text: And reverend looker-on of two fair queens.

speaker: STANLEY
text:
To
                 
                Anne
                .
                 
              Come, madam, you must straight to Westminster,

speaker: STANLEY
text: There to be crownèd Richard’s royal queen.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Ah, cut my lace asunder

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: That my pent heart may have some scope to beat,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Or else I swoon with this dead-killing news!

speaker: ANNE
text: Despiteful tidings! O, unpleasing news!

speaker: DORSET
text: Be of good cheer, mother. How fares your Grace?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: O Dorset, speak not to me. Get thee gone.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Death and destruction dogs thee at thy heels.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Thy mother’s name is ominous to children.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: If thou wilt outstrip death, go, cross the seas,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: And live with Richmond, from the reach of hell.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Go, hie thee, hie thee from this slaughterhouse,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Lest thou increase the number of the dead

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: And make me die the thrall of Margaret’s curse,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Nor mother, wife, nor England’s counted queen.

speaker: STANLEY
text: Full of wise care is this your counsel, madam.

speaker: STANLEY
text:
To
                 
                Dorset
                .
                 
              Take all the swift advantage of the hours.

speaker: STANLEY
text: You shall have letters from me to my son

speaker: STANLEY
text: In your behalf, to meet you on the way.

speaker: STANLEY
text: Be not ta’en tardy by unwise delay.

speaker: DUCHESS
text: O ill-dispersing wind of misery!

speaker: DUCHESS
text: O my accursèd womb, the bed of death!

speaker: DUCHESS
text: A cockatrice hast thou hatched to the world,

speaker: DUCHESS
text: Whose unavoided eye is murderous.

speaker: STANLEY
text: Come, madam, come. I in all haste was sent.

speaker: ANNE
text: And I with all unwillingness will go.

speaker: ANNE
text: O, would to God that the inclusive verge

speaker: ANNE
text: Of golden metal that must round my brow

speaker: ANNE
text: Were red-hot steel to sear me to the brains!

speaker: ANNE
text: Anointed let me be with deadly venom,

speaker: ANNE
text: And die ere men can say “God save the Queen.”

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Go, go, poor soul, I envy not thy glory.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: To feed my humor, wish thyself no harm.

speaker: ANNE
text: No? Why? When he that is my husband now

speaker: ANNE
text: Came to me as I followed Henry’s corse,

speaker: ANNE
text: When scarce the blood was well washed from his hands

speaker: ANNE
text: Which issued from my other angel husband

speaker: ANNE
text: And that dear saint which then I weeping followed—

speaker: ANNE
text: O, when, I say, I looked on Richard’s face,

speaker: ANNE
text: This was my wish: be thou, quoth I, accursed

speaker: ANNE
text: For making me, so young, so old a widow;

speaker: ANNE
text: And, when thou wedd’st, let sorrow haunt thy bed;

speaker: ANNE
text: And be thy wife, if any be so mad,

speaker: ANNE
text: More miserable by the life of thee

speaker: ANNE
text: Than thou hast made me by my dear lord’s death.

speaker: ANNE
text: Lo, ere I can repeat this curse again,

speaker: ANNE
text: Within so small a time my woman’s heart

speaker: ANNE
text: Grossly grew captive to his honey words

speaker: ANNE
text: And proved the subject of mine own soul’s curse,

speaker: ANNE
text: Which hitherto hath held my eyes from rest,

speaker: ANNE
text: For never yet one hour in his bed

speaker: ANNE
text: Did I enjoy the golden dew of sleep,

speaker: ANNE
text: But with his timorous dreams was still awaked.

speaker: ANNE
text: Besides, he hates me for my father Warwick,

speaker: ANNE
text: And will, no doubt, shortly be rid of me.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Poor heart, adieu. I pity thy complaining.

speaker: ANNE
text: No more than with my soul I mourn for yours.

speaker: DORSET
text: Farewell, thou woeful welcomer of glory.

speaker: ANNE
text: Adieu, poor soul that tak’st thy leave of it.

speaker: DUCHESS
text: Go thou to Richmond, and good fortune guide thee.

speaker: DUCHESS
text:
To
                 
                Anne
                .
                 
              Go thou to Richard, and good angels tend thee.

speaker: DUCHESS
text:
To
                 
                Queen
                 
                Elizabeth
                .
                 
              Go thou to sanctuary, and good thoughts possess thee.

speaker: DUCHESS
text: I to my grave, where peace and rest lie with me.

speaker: DUCHESS
text: Eighty-odd years of sorrow have I seen,

speaker: DUCHESS
text: And each hour’s joy wracked with a week of teen.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Stay, yet look back with me unto the Tower.—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Pity, you ancient stones, those tender babes

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Whom envy hath immured within your walls—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Rough cradle for such little pretty ones.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Rude ragged nurse, old sullen playfellow

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: For tender princes, use my babies well.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: So foolish sorrows bids your stones farewell.
